title: Polymarket partners with Nasdaq to list private company contracts
summary: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.

title: Senator Warren questions OCC chief on approval of ‘ineligible’ crypto trust charters

title: Saks Global CEO on Next Steps in Bankruptcy Process, Path To Growth
summary: Saks Global CEO Geoffroy van Raemdonck discusses the progress the company has made since filing for bankruptcy. title: Stocks Fall as Fed-Hike Anxiety Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
summary: The latest bout of weakness in bonds lifted yields to multi-year highs, reducing the appetite for stocks on speculation that a torrid market surge has gone too far amid war-fueled inflation risks.
